specs.title: cp-000: 503 when AI detection throws returns error AI detection service is unavailable P
cp-001: 500 catch-all returns error Failed to analyze text line 159

specs.title: cp-004: API checks isAIConfigured before processing and returns 503 if false line 59
cp-005: API persists results to integrityChecks database table after every successful ch
cp-006: Database persistence failure is non-fatal results are still returned to the clie
cp-007: contentChecked field in DB is truncated to first 5000 characters of submitted te
cp-008: Zod sources schema validates an array of objects with optional fields title doi
cp-009: Paid plans are basic pro institutional the PAID_PLANS set at line 22
cp-010: Free plan users get AI detection only plagiarism citation audit and self-plagiar
cp-011: Response includes tier field free or paid checkedAt ISO timestamp and optional s
cp-012: writingQualitypassiveVoiceCount in the API response is derived from passiveVoice
cp-013: writingQualityreadabilityGrade in the API response comes from the AI detection e
cp-014: fleschReadingEase is clamped to 0-100 range and rounded to integer with Mathroun
cp-015: fleschKincaidGrade is clamped to 0 and rounded to 1 decimal place MathroundrawGr
cp-016: gunningFogIndex is clamped to 0 and rounded to 1 decimal place Mathround 10 10 l
cp-017: automatedReadabilityIndex is clamped to 0 and rounded to 1 decimal Mathround 10
cp-018: colemanLiauIndex is clamped to 0 and rounded to 1 decimal Mathround 10 10 line 2
cp-019: vocabularyDiversity is a type-token ratio rounded to 2 decimal places Mathround
cp-020: avgSyllablesPerWord is rounded to 2 decimal places Mathround 100 100 line 292
cp-021: avgWordsPerSentence and avgSentenceLength are identical values both Mathroundavg
cp-022: complexWordPercentage is rounded to 1 decimal Mathround 1000 10 line 290
cp-023: classifyReason maps write-good reasons passive voice type passive severity warni
cp-024: Complex sentence issues have reason This sentence has N words Consider breaking
cp-025: isComplexWord requires 3 syllables AND excludes words ending in ed es or ing lin
